title: Maintain quality system and continuous improvement processes within work or functional area
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain quality system and continuous improvement processes within work or functional area demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Maintain quality framework within work area

pcs.text: Provide information about the workplace quality system to personnel in formats suited to their needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide information about the workplace quality system to personnel in formats suited to their needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information about the workplace quality system to personnel in formats suited to their needs.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use communication tools that encourage personnel to participate in improvement processes and to assume responsibility for quality outputs.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement personnel development practices that support individuals to meet their responsibilities and quality requirements.
